name: Catbotica: The Celestial Cat-Circuit — Zodiac Badge Collection
description: The full Zodiac Vault — twelve zodiac-frequency calibration templates pre-loaded into every Catbotica unit's firmware at the founding of Catbotica Industries. Each annual Luck-Module Recalibration Protocol (LMRP) cycle activates the corresponding zodiac badge, unlocking it for eligible units. Collect all twelve to complete the Celestial Cat-Circuit.
